*** 1 INJ *** AT LEAST ONE PERSON WAS HURT AFTER A TREE FELL ONTO THEIR VEHICLE WHILE DRIVING, ACCORDING TO ILLINOIS STATE POLICE. ISP SAYS IT HAPPENED ON ROUTE 146 JUST EAST OF MT. PISGAH ROAD AROUND 10:40 P.M. FRIDAY. THE TRUCK WAS HEADING WEST ON ROUTE 146 WHEN A LARGE TREE FELL ONTO THE VEHICLE, ACCORDING TO ISP. TWO OCCUPANTS WERE INSIDE THE VEHICLE BUT ONLY ONE WAS TAKEN TO A HOSPITAL FOR TREATMENT. REPORT RELAYED BY WSIL-TV.
